items.title: DRG In Malaysia: Where Is The Biggest Gap? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan
items.summary: Intent without readiness for DRG produces disruption, not improvement. The coding gap, system inadequacy, physician documentation culture, actuarial repricing deficit, and unresolved governance questions aren't peripheral issues, but are the reform itself. The post DRG In Malaysia: Where Is The Biggest Gap? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: MMA Supports Stronger Enforcement Against Unlicensed Health Care Premises — MMA
items.summary: Safeguarding public trust in private health care and shutting down illegal operators are inseparable goals. A health care sector cannot maintain its credibility if illegal operators are allowed to operate unchecked. The post MMA Supports Stronger Enforcement Against Unlicensed Health Care Premises — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Cost of Uncertainty In Medical Subspecialty Training — Specialist
items.summary: Results of subspecialty training applications are often informed only weeks before training begins, making it difficult for established specialists in their 30s and 40s, with young children and ageing parents, to uproot their life in a short span of time. The post The Cost of Uncertainty In Medical Subspecialty Training — Specialist appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Minimally Invasive Solution For TMJ Disorders
items.summary: Temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disorders affect the jaw joint. Modern TMJ surgery today is far more refined and minimally invasive compared to the past. Advancements in surgical techniques now allow patients to recover faster with minimal visible scarring. The post Minimally Invasive Solution For TMJ Disorders appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Clock Ticks For Health Minister To File Nicotine Case Appeal
items.summary: The health minister and government have 12 days until June 15 to appeal the High Court's liquid nicotine ruling. Past the midway point of the 30-day deadline, a lawyer for NGOs in the case says no appeal has been served on his firm yet. The post Clock Ticks For Health Minister To File Nicotine Case Appeal appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Stop Normalising Chickenpox: It’s Time Children Got The Full Shot — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail
items.summary: A preventable illness that hospitalises healthy children, devastates pregnant women, and kills immunocompromised kids is not harmless. It is a public health failure. The post Stop Normalising Chickenpox: It’s Time Children Got The Full Shot — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Courage To Be Wrong — Dr Loshi Rajen
items.summary: The task is not simply to identify psychiatric symptoms. Sometimes, the task is to determine why those symptoms exist. The post The Courage To Be Wrong — Dr Loshi Rajen appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: NGOs Question MOH Data On Enforcement Against Online Vape Ads, Sales
items.summary: Forty-nine NGOs question the transparency of data on MOH's enforcement under Act 852, asking whether the compounds, investigation papers, and prosecutions truly reflect action against online vape advertising and sales, as they demand specific statistics. The post NGOs Question MOH Data On Enforcement Against Online Vape Ads, Sales appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Protecting Malaysia’s Children From An Invisible Threat — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail
items.summary: RSV is the leading cause of hospitalisation for all infants in Malaysia, yet it remains under-discussed and unaddressed. The post Protecting Malaysia’s Children From An Invisible Threat — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Put Liquid Nicotine On Poisons List, Revisit Tobacco GEG — LCNM
items.summary: Liquid nicotine must be relisted on the Poisons List. The government should also revisit the tobacco GEG. For all the truly remarkable recent advances in the diagnosis and treatment of lung cancer, effective tobacco control remains a powerful strategy. The post Put Liquid Nicotine On Poisons List, Revisit Tobacco GEG — LCNM appeared first on CodeBlue .
